name: 冷酷宣告型
description: 女主在完成某個關鍵步驟後冷靜宣告自己的立場和行動，語氣平靜但內容殘酷。冷靜的語調反而比憤怒更有力量感。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: From now on, I Fu Yining and the Fu family will sever all ties. The Fu assets are mine alone. ... Forgive them. The debt they owe me. I haven't settled item by item.
